Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Compel Deft To Produce Person(S) Most Knowledgeable & Documents At Deposition & For Monetary And/Or Evidentiary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James L. Pagano for plaintiff and moving party Eric Ferenchak and Robert Maltz for defendant Mark A. Howard
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant To Produce Person(s) Most Knowledgeable and Documents At Deposition and For Monetary and/or Evidentiary Sanctions is denied. The defendant is a natural person, now deceased. There is no basis for a Person Most Knowledgeable deposition. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
